proposals.name: Coastal Sprinter X1
proposals.summary: Limited-stop express between Worthing town centre and Brighton along the A259, every 30 minutes daytime.
proposals.description: The 700 Coastliner is the only direct east-west link, and it stops everywhere — a Brighton commute can take over an hour. The X1 would skip residential side stops to deliver a 35-minute Worthing → Brighton run, complementing (not replacing) the 700. Suggested operator: Stagecoach South or Brighton & Hove jointly.

proposals.name: South Downs Loop 99
proposals.summary: Hourly circular linking Worthing, Findon, Steyning, Bramber, Upper Beeding and Lancing — restoring lost inland connectivity.
proposals.description: Findon's hourly bus is the 1A, which loops via West Worthing rather than serving the Steyning corridor. The Loop 99 would be a true circular running both directions, giving inland villages a single route into Worthing or Lancing without changing buses. Best paired with rail timetables at Lancing and Worthing stations.

proposals.name: Hospital Shuttle H1
proposals.summary: Frequent (every 15 min) shuttle from Worthing Hospital via the town centre to Lancing Beach, replacing the truncated 700-A.
proposals.description: Hospital workers and visitors currently rely on infrequent connections through the town centre. A dedicated 15-minute shuttle would also serve the high-density seafront residential strip, where car ownership is below average and bus reliability is critical.

proposals.name: Coastliner Express 700X
proposals.summary: Express overlay on the 700 corridor — every stop within Worthing and Brighton, but only major town-centre stops between, halving the end-to-end time.
proposals.description: The 700 stops at every cul-de-sac end along the A259, turning a 25-mile coastal trip into a 90-minute slog. The 700X would mirror the local 700 inside Worthing and Brighton (so suburban riders still get a one-seat ride into town), then run express between the two — calling only at Lancing Stn, Shoreham-by-Sea and Hove Town Hall. Target end-to-end: Worthing Hospital → Brighton Stn in 45 minutes, half the current scheduled time. Best operated jointly by Stagecoach and Brighton & Hove on alternate hours.
